post.description:
Register with email, password, and display_name.

* Returns 409 if email already exists.
* Returns 201 + access/refresh tokens on success.
Generate a TOTP secret and backup codes for the user.
Verify a TOTP code to confirm 2FA works.

Authenticate with email + password.

* Returns 401 with a generic message for any credential mismatch
  (avoids leaking which field is wrong).

post.summary: Issue a one-time Nostr sign-in challenge
Log in or register with a Nostr identity
Rotate a refresh token and issue a fresh token pair

get.summary: Return referral relationships and earned rewards for the authenticated user

post.summary: Verify an API key for internal services

get.summary: Return onboarding custody and fiat handoff requirements

post.description:
Submit a KYC verification request.

Creates or returns the existing record.  Once submitted the platform
operator reviews and approves/rejects via the admin endpoint.

get.summary: Get the current user's KYC verification status
get.description:
Return the verification status of the authenticated user.

Returns 404 if the user has not submitted a KYC request.

get.summary: List all KYC verification records (admin only)
get.description: Return all KYC records.  Admins can filter by status.

put.summary: Update a user's KYC verification status (admin only)
put.description: Admin-only endpoint to approve, reject, or expire a user's KYC status.
